title: Voltas is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Voltas is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Voltas are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Voltas:
Voltas is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voltas!
